---
name: 🎨 UI/UX Improvement
about: Suggest visual layout, theme, or animation design polish.
title: 'design: '
labels: design, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the design improvement**
A clear and concise description of the user experience, alignment, sizing, contrast, or animation issue.

**Proposed Solution**
What design changes do you recommend? (e.g. typography adjustment, hover transition, colors, spacing).

**References & Inspirations**
If applicable, share links or references (e.g. Linear, Raycast, Stripe) or paste mockups showing the ideal visual state.

**Screenshots**
Add screenshots of the current UI that needs improvement.
